ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Higgsfield-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Higgsfield-AI
Language: javascript
Open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI — Free AI image generation & cinema studio with 20+ models (Flux, SDXL, Midjourney, Ideogram). Self-hosted, customizable, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foxhui/WebAI2API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foxhui/WebAI2API
Language: javascript
WebAI2API: 基于 Camoufox 的网页 AI 转 API 工具，支持 LMArena/Gemini等，多窗口并发与账号隔离。 | Web AI to OpenAI API via Camoufox. Supports LMArena/Gemini and more, multi-window concurrency & account isolation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greensock/GSAP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greensock/GSAP
Language: javascript
GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform), a JavaScript animation library for the modern web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jgraph/drawio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio
Language: javascript
draw.io is a JavaScript, client-side editor for general diagramming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maboloshi/github-chinese
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maboloshi/github-chinese
Language: javascript
GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mui/material-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mui/material-ui
Language: javascript
Material UI: Comprehensive React component library that implements Google's Material Design. Free forever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
Language: javascript
Community curated list of templates for the nuclei engine to find security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stephengpope/thepopebot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stephengpope/thepopebot
Language: javascript
The Pope Bot is an autonomous AI agent that you can configure and build to do just about anything you want, all day, everyday, 24/7.
